title: Star Bazaar is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Star Bazaar is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
